title: Arama Algoritmalari
subtitle: Dogrusal ve binary arama ornekleri.
code:
def linear_search(arr, target)
  arr.each_with_index do |value, index|
    return index if value == target
  end
  -1
end

def binary_search(arr, target)
  left, right = 0, arr.length - 1

  while left <= right
    mid = (left + right) / 2

    if arr[mid] == target
      return mid
    elsif arr[mid] < target
      left = mid + 1
    else
      right = mid - 1
    end
  end
  -1
end

numbers = [4, 12, 7, 23, 9, 1, 18]
target = 23

linear_result = linear_search(numbers, target)
puts "Dogrusal arama: #{target} indeks #{linear_result}'de bulundu"

# Binary arama icin dizi siralanmali
sorted_numbers = numbers.sort

binary_result = binary_search(sorted_numbers, target)
puts "Binary arama: #{target} indeks #{binary_result}'de bulundu"

not_found = linear_search(numbers, 99)
puts "\n99 araniyor (bulunamayacak): #{not_found}"

# Ruby'nin kendi include? ve index metodu
puts "\ninclude? ile kontrol: #{numbers.include?(target)}"
puts "index ile konum: #{numbers.index(target)}"
